// Format timestamp
export const formatTime=dateString=>{const date=new Date(dateString);return date.toLocaleTimeString('vi-VN',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit',fractionalSecondDigits:3});};// Format relative time từ log đầu tiên
export const formatRelativeTime=ms=>{if(ms<1000)return"+".concat(ms,"ms");if(ms<60000)return"+".concat((ms/1000).toFixed(1),"s");return"+".concat((ms/60000).toFixed(1),"m");};// Format gap time
export const formatGap=ms=>{if(!ms||ms===0)return'';if(ms<1000)return"(+".concat(ms,"ms)");if(ms<60000)return"(+".concat((ms/1000).toFixed(1),"s)");return"(+".concat((ms/60000).toFixed(1),"m)");};// Format data object thành string ngắn gọn
export const formatData=function(data){let maxLength=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:100;if(!data||Object.keys(data).length===0)return'';const str=Object.entries(data).map(_ref=>{let[key,value]=_ref;if(typeof value==='object'){return"".concat(key,"=").concat(JSON.stringify(value));}return"".concat(key,"=").concat(value);}).join(', ');if(str.length>maxLength){return str.substring(0,maxLength)+'...';}return str;};// Format log thành 1 dòng cho Claude
export const formatLogLine=(log,firstTime,index)=>{const diff=new Date(log.clientTime).getTime()-firstTime;const gap=log.sinceLastEvent||0;let marker='  ';if(log.level==='error')marker='❌';else if(log.level==='warn')marker='⚠️';else if(gap>1000)marker='🐌';else if(gap<2&&index>0)marker='⚡';const seq="#".concat(log.sequence.toString().padStart(4));const time=formatRelativeTime(diff).padStart(10);const gapStr=formatGap(gap).padStart(12);const feature=log.feature.toUpperCase().padEnd(12);const event=log.event.padEnd(24);const data=formatData(log.data);return"".concat(marker," ").concat(seq," ").concat(time," ").concat(gapStr," ").concat(feature," ").concat(event," ").concat(data);};// Format nhiều logs cho Claude
export const formatLogsForClaude=logs=>{if(!logs||logs.length===0)return'No logs found.';const firstTime=new Date(logs[0].clientTime).getTime();const project=logs[0].project;const session=logs[0].sessionId;const features=[...new Set(logs.map(l=>l.feature))].join(', ');const errorCount=logs.filter(l=>l.level==='error').length;const warnCount=logs.filter(l=>l.level==='warn').length;const header=["=== DEBUG LOG ===","Project: ".concat(project),"Session: ".concat(session),"Features: ".concat(features),"Total: ".concat(logs.length," logs | Errors: ").concat(errorCount," | Warnings: ").concat(warnCount),"","Legend: \u274C Error | \u26A0\uFE0F Warning | \uD83D\uDC0C Slow (>1s) | \u26A1 Fast (<2ms, possible race)","","".concat('MK'.padEnd(2)," ").concat('#SEQ'.padStart(5)," ").concat('TIME'.padStart(10)," ").concat('GAP'.padStart(12)," ").concat('FEATURE'.padEnd(12)," ").concat('EVENT'.padEnd(24)," DATA"),"".concat('─'.repeat(100))];const lines=logs.map((log,index)=>formatLogLine(log,firstTime,index));return[...header,...lines].join('\n');};// Format anomaly thành text
export const formatAnomaly=anomaly=>{switch(anomaly.type){case'RACE_CONDITION':return"\u26A1 RACE: ".concat(anomaly.events.map(e=>e.event).join(' vs ')," (").concat(anomaly.message,")");case'CONFLICT':return"\u274C CONFLICT on \"".concat(anomaly.target,"\": ").concat(anomaly.message);case'SLOW':return"\uD83D\uDC0C SLOW at #".concat(anomaly.sequence,": ").concat(anomaly.message);case'ERROR':return"\u274C ERROR at #".concat(anomaly.sequence,": ").concat(anomaly.message);default:return"\u26A0\uFE0F ".concat(anomaly.type,": ").concat(anomaly.message);}};
